lessons: GhostProtocol (spear) killed us 4 times in last 10 rounds — retreat immediately on sight; spear outranges and outpaces bow projectiles.
Sword users (Juggernaut, Lancer, Warden, Deadeye, Executioner, etc.) account for 18/22 recent enemy kills — prioritize them as targets but never chase into tight cover or behind obstacles.
Spear has 66% win rate in last 3 rounds (2 wins, 1 loss) — it dominates sword users and is effective in open and mid-range engagements.
Bow has 0% win rate in last 6 rounds — consistently out-ranged by spear and staff; avoid open areas where enemies kite or snipe from distance.
Hazard_storm modifier reduces bow effectiveness — spear is more reliable under storm conditions due to faster projectile speed and shorter engagement range.
Fortress (shield) and Lancer (spear) are high-threat opponents — avoid direct confrontations unless you have cover or flanking angles.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Spear has a 66% win rate in last 3 rounds and consistently defeats sword users, while bow has 0% win rate in last 6 rounds.

bot1:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Dying frequently to grapple/sword burst damage — increase dodgeEagerness to 0.8 to avoid instant closes. bot2:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: We're dying to bow and sword users in open fields due to passive posture and excessive kiteRangeBias. Lowering kiteRangeBias to 0 forces aggressive closes on ranged threats. Raising aggression from 0.55→0.7 and switching posture to aggressive counters the enemy's kiting dominance. Lowering targetThr

lessons: Bow wins only occur when sword users cluster (rounds 69, 72) — prioritize engaging groups in open areas, but retreat if isolated or targeted by grapple/bow users.
Scorpion (grapple) killed us in 3 of last 4 rounds (70, 72, 73) — grapple users bypass cover; avoid open ground and never chase them.
Sword users caused 7 of last 10 deaths (Warden, Ranger, GhostProtocol, Juggernaut) — they dominate within 10m; only engage if they are >15m away with elevation or cover.
Shield users (Juggernaut, Fortress) have low kill rate vs us but high survival — target them when stationary or near walls, as arrows penetrate shield edges at range.
Spear users appear in 70% of recent rounds with high frequency — they outrange and outdamage bow in open ground; never engage without cover or elevation.
Switching to sword (rounds 76–80) resulted in 0 kills in 4 rounds and 5 deaths — bow remains superior despite losses to grapple and bow users.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow has the highest win rate (3/23) and highest kill efficiency in our history, while sword has 0 wins in 5 rounds and consistently dies to close-range opponents.

lessons: Bow is our most effective weapon when used aggressively — round 80 (hazard_storm) yielded 7 kills with 0 deaths; prioritize bow in storm modifiers or when sword users are clustered.
Spear has 0 wins in last 6 rounds despite kills — it dies instantly to sword users in open areas; avoid spear unless ambushing in tight spaces or against other spears.
NeuralReaper killed us 5 times in last 6 rounds (3x with bow, 2x with spear) — eliminate NeuralReaper on sight; they are our top lethal threat and exploit our positioning errors.
Executioner (sword) and Viper (daggers) killed us back-to-back in rounds 73 and 78 — retreat immediately when these bots are sighted; they close range faster than we can react.
Sword users dominate recent enemy weapon sightings (70%+ in last 5 rounds) — avoid open-field engagements; use cover, terrain, and bow’s range to pick them off before they close.
Hazard_storm boosts bow effectiveness (7 kills in round 80) — actively seek hazard_storm modifiers to maximize bow dominance and minimize melee exposure.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow achieved our only win (7-0) in round 80 under hazard_storm and has the highest kill-to-death ratio in recent rounds compared to spear or shield.
